# Class: BaseResult

Defined in: [core/specification/shared/result/result.ts:33](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/shared/result/result.ts#L33)

Base result - common accessors available after any action type.
Extended by HttpResult, CliResult, and used directly by job results.

Every result carries a fresh [CaptureScope](../interfaces/CaptureScope.md): `match.ref()` captures
and `{{type#ref}}` placeholders are scoped to one spec execution.

## Extended by

- [`CliResult`](CliResult.md)
- [`HttpResult`](HttpResult.md)
- [`FetchResult`](FetchResult.md)
- [`PageResult`](PageResult.md)
